title: From 2000: Sirimavo Bandaranaike of Sri Lanka Dies at 84; First Woman Premier
summary_full: She rose to power in 1960 as a widow and mother of three, becoming the first woman in the world to serve as a prime minister.
summary_public: She rose to power in 1960 as a widow and mother of three, becoming the first woman in the world to serve as a prime minister.
